title: Verify successful account creation with valid email and 12-character password
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the provided email
test_steps: Enter a unique valid email address in the email field
Enter a password of exactly 12 characters meeting all requirements
expected_results: User is redirected to the email verification page or notified to verify email

title: Verify account creation is rejected when email field is empty
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid password meeting length requirements
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that email is required

title: Verify account creation is rejected when password field is empty
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that password is required

title: Verify account creation is rejected when email already exists
preconditions: An existing account with email 'test@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Enter email 'test@example.com' in the email field
Enter a valid password meeting length requirements
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use

title: Verify account creation with password of exactly 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the provided email
test_steps: Enter a unique valid email address
Enter a password of exactly 8 characters

title: Verify account creation with password of exactly 50 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the provided email
test_steps: Enter a unique valid email address
Enter a password of exactly 50 characters

title: Verify account creation is rejected with password of 7 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address
Enter a password of exactly 7 characters
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that password must be at least 8 characters

title: Verify account creation is rejected with password of 51 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address
Enter a password of exactly 51 characters
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that password must be at most 50 characters

title: Verify login is blocked when email is not verified
preconditions: User has created an account but has not verified their email
User is on the login page
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that email verification is required

title: Verify successful login after email verification within 24 hours
preconditions: User has verified their email within the last 24 hours
User is on the login page
expected_results: User is redirected to the dashboard or home page

title: Verify login is blocked when verification link has expired
preconditions: User has created an account but did not verify email within 24 hours
User is on the login page
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is not verified or the verification link has expired
